title: Marine Corps Times
text:
Early Bird Brief
The defense industry's most comprehensive news & information delivered to your inbox every morning.
Daily News Roundup
The top stories of the day delivered to you every afternoon.
Army Times
Navy Times
Air Force Times
Marine Corps Times
News Alerts
Breaking news as it happens, plus exclusive reports and features you'll find only at Marine Corps Times, delivered to your inbox.
GearScout Weekly
Get your fill of tactical coolness in this newsletter packed with guns, gear, and so much more. (Weekly)
Pay and Benefits
Stay up-to-date on changing military benefits and pay. (Monthly)
Education & Transition
News, tips, and other useful content related to education, employment, entrepreneurship and other transition-related matters. (Bi-weekly)
Commentary & Opinion
Insight and perspectives from military leaders, veterans and advocates on DoD policies, the Pentagon, deployments and more, delivered to you weekly.
Veterans and Retirement Report
Insights on retirement benefits and issues. (Weekly)
Discounts & Deals
Discounts and special offers available only to the military community.
Service Member of the Year
Each year, Military Times honors 5 service members who go above and beyond what is expected of them. Find out about the nominees and event details.
Events
Information about upcoming events produced by Military Times and other Sightline Media Group brands.
Promotions & Offers
Information on new products, services, special offers, and programs when they become available.
Email Address:
Country of Residence:
Need Help?
To sign up - make your selections, share your email address and click Sign Up.
To edit your email newsletter subscriptions - enter your email address, click Sign Up and you'll be shown your newsletter subscriber status. You can change your selections here.
To change the email address where you receive your newsletters, enter your email address on this screen - the next screen will redirect you.
Thank you!
